nir-ṇij (√nij) P. -ṇenekti (Subj. -ṇenijati; Ā. ṇenikte,  Br. ; dat. inf. -ṇije,  RV. ), (P.)
to wash off, cleanse,  Br. ;  ChUp. ;
(Ā.) id.,  TS. ;
to wash or dress or adorn one's self,  RV. ; &c.

results.rendered_html:
nirṇij (nij mit nis) f. glänzender Putz, Schmuck; schmückendes Gewand, Prachtkleid  NAIGH. 3,7 . bibhraddrāpiṃ hiraṇyayaṃ varuṇo vasta nirṇijam  ṚV. 1,25,13 . apa kṛṣṇāṃ nirṇijaṃ devyāvaḥ 113,14 . 162,2 . 5,62,4 . 7,64,1 . 8,19,23 . gāḥ kṛṇvāno na nirṇijam 9,14,5 . 86,26 . ghṛtaṃ vasānaḥ pari yāsi nirṇijam 82,2 . śukrāṃ vayantyasurāya nirṇijam 99,1 . gavyayī tvagbhavati nirṇigavyayī 70,7 . 10,27,24 . sahasra˚ (ratha) 8,8,11 .
— Vgl. adhi˚, aśva˚, ghṛta˚, candra˚, varṣa˚, hiraṇya˚.
